text.title: Risk Management Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce and maintain the risk register end-to-end.

step.name: identify
step.input: Charter, WBS, vendor SOWs, ADRs, historical archive
step.action: Run the agent with PROMPT-list (Political, Regulatory, Organisational, Market, People, Technical) seeded with project artefacts; require source citation per candidate.
step.decision-gate: Reject any candidate lacking source citation; re-seed and retry.

step.name: analyse
step.action: Apply qualitative P×I (VL..VH). Escalate to EMV for risks where contingency must be defended to finance. Record one-line rationale citing source per score.
step.decision-gate: If any score lacks rationale citing artefact, return to author.

step.name: respond
step.action: Assign strategy (avoid/transfer/mitigate/accept for threats; exploit/enhance/share/accept for opportunities) + named owner + observable trigger per row.
step.output: Register with strategy + owner + trigger filled
step.decision-gate: Reject rows missing trigger or owner.

step.name: monitor
step.action: Each weekly cycle, run the diff agent; verify triggers; update probabilities with new evidence; flag stale rows >14 days.

step.name: close
step.action: Mark each closed risk with outcome label (materialized / passed_without_triggering / merged_into_R-NN) and date. Never delete.
step.decision-gate: Reject deletions; reverse and re-close with outcome.
